taskScope: Iteration 1 (Маршруты/bar bottom panel): added the second map-provider control «Яндекс карты» (reused SelectControl with an optional iconSrc rendering the yandex.svg brand glyph instead of the chevron) beside «Контурность карты» in the «Настройки карты» card, matching the Figma эталон; the flexible «Высота по барометру» legend auto-compresses to absorb the wider card. Verified at 1920 with the rail collapsed (50px) and expanded (240px): no horizontal overflow; control widths 158/125px, gap 4px, card height 86px, glyph 16×16. The routes-rail-expanded baseline was refreshed and a routes-rail-collapsed baseline added, both at the two-control state. Iteration 2: tightened the shared filter-toggle (SwitchToggle) spacing to the Figma эталон across every filter list — 10px label (was 12px), 6px toggle↔label gap (was 8px), 28x16 indicator, 20px item height (was 30px), and a 4px dense row gap + 4px trailing pad (≈8px between toggles, was 16px); the filter ControlFields on bar/sat/kick/stats (FilterToggleCard) and the map tab (MapBottomPanel) are now dense. This frees width so «Высота по барометру» no longer over-compresses at 1920 with the rail expanded (267px vs 143px before). Refreshed the routes (x2) and map (x4: collapsed/expanded at 1920x1080 and 1920x768) baselines to the tightened state; top-control-map and telemetry baselines unchanged. Iteration 3 (Маршруты/bar «Работа с данными по карте» top-control card): sized the search + date inputs to the Figma эталон and stopped them stretching to fill the flexible card — search 256px / dates 180px each (rail collapsed) narrowing to 181px / 120px (rail expanded) via a scoped .dataWorkCard class with per-rail-state widths, the search and date group 16px apart (was the 24px card gap), date fields now date-only «24-04-2025» (the existing map-date-card pattern, no «| 00:00»). Refreshed the routes (x2) baselines; map/telemetry/top-control baselines unchanged. Iteration 4 (Маршруты/bar toolbar fill): the «Работа с данными по карте» card is no longer flexible — it hugs its content so its right edge sits 16px (card padding) from the last input; «Погодные параметры» became the flexible (rubber) card and absorbs the freed toolbar width, «Тип данных» stays right-anchored. Verified at 1920 collapsed + expanded (card edge exactly 16px from the last input, no overflow). Refreshed the routes (x2) baselines.
references: Figma per-tab block exports: Desktop/Work/Верхние блоки управления/*_общий блок.png and *_code.md (design source for sizing/colors)
Numeric spec: card #171d20 surface, #727677 1px outline, 2px radius, 16px padding, 30px controls, 24px #2970ff active segment

assertions: Each tab renders its TabTopControls toolbar above the map at the top of the workspace right column (toolbar y = 48px Header, toolbar x = map x). Verified for all six tabs in tests/e2e/top-controls.spec.ts.

Card sections use the #171d20 surface, #727677 1px outline, 2px radius, and 16px padding; titles are 12px/500 white; controls are 30px tall with 3px radius; the segmented Тип данных active pill is 24px on #2970ff.

The Тип данных group stays pinned right; at 1920 with the rail collapsed the cards fill the full toolbar width with no internal horizontal scroll and no overlap of the data-type group (the per-tab date/time card flexes; verified per tab in e2e). Below 1920 the chrome reflows: function-group icons and the map toggles fold into chevron overflow dropdowns and the bottom-panel filters collapse; the chrome caps at the 2560 content max while the map stays full-bleed (verified at 1280/1920/2560/3840 in tests/e2e/top-controls.spec.ts and workspace-shell.spec.ts).

The map toolbar (icon-heavy) keeps a cropped pixel baseline; the other tabs are covered by DOM/CSS metrics + e2e instead of a pixel baseline, because dense text labels (font anti-aliasing) and the 50px->300px panel motion make a cropped toolbar pixel-diff non-deterministic. Panel tabs align the toolbar to the 300px panel (e2e toolbar.x === 300).
The map function block renders 11 + 8 + 4 + 9 Blueprint icon buttons + 2 layer toggles; every glyph SVG loads and every icon button keeps an aria-label (e2e).
Map height/offset now account for the toolbar and the map-tab bottom panel; the frozen map gutter (10px), inner inset (8px), and radii (2px/4px) are unchanged (workspace-shell.spec.ts).

The map-tab MapBottomPanel is a fixed 96px footer reusing the frozen ControlCard surface, with three sub-blocks (Фильтрация switches · Нижняя граница облаков rainbow gradient legend · Управление данными actions). The rainbow stops live only in _tokens.scss ($gradient-cloud-legend, sampled from the reference); it only reduces the map height, leaving the right-anchored stage contract unchanged.
Actual and diff artifacts stay under reports/visual-qa/.

Per-tab bottom panels (bar/tmi/sat/kick/stats) reuse the frozen ControlCard/ControlField/SwitchToggle/ChipButton primitives; kick/stats render WorkspaceTableSurface (a dark table container mirroring the frozen map gutter/inset/2px-4px radii) instead of the map (A13 re-opened 2026-06-15), and the sat left panel is the OsiDus gallery. These new surfaces were verified against the эталон via the visual_qa_guardian subagent plus DOM/CSS metrics; committed pixel baselines stay limited to the map/routes/telemetry chrome to avoid bloating the repo with the heavy full-screen эталон PNGs.

cases.name: top-control-map-1920x1080
cases.toleranceNote: Cross-OS budget: the baseline is captured on Windows (DirectWrite) while CI rasterises on Linux (FreeType); after the 2026-06 runner image update the dense text strip double-images at ~11.2% on CI while staying at ~0.4% locally. Geometry drift would land well above this budget; the local gate keeps the tight default.
